articles.title: Driver dead and 33 people seriously injured as Bedford train crash declared major incident
articles.description: The crash, which happened at about 17:15 BST, has left almost 90 people hurt.

articles.title: 'People flew from their seats': Passengers describe how crash unfolded
articles.description: The East of England Ambulance Service says nearly 90 people have been injured -over 30 of them seriously.

articles.title: What we know so far about Bedford train crash
articles.description: Two East Midland Railway trains crashed into each other, with emergency services now on the scene

articles.title: Video shows scene of collision as passenger speaks about aftermath
articles.description: Passenger Pete Knapp said the crash "felt like [he'd] been in a bomb explosion".
